tagline: Interior, exterior, and detail work that lasts. Painting with the patience of a craftsman.
services_intro: Residential and commercial painting done with patience and skill. No rushed jobs, no skipped prep, no surprise charges.
service_1_desc: Walls, trim, ceilings, doors. We prep right, mask everything, and clean up like we were never there.
service_2_desc: House siding, decks, fences, and full exterior repaints. Power-wash and primer included.
service_3_desc: Kitchen cabinets, custom finishes, and accent walls. Where most painters cut corners, we slow down.
review_1_quote: Best paint job our house has ever had. Five years later it still looks new.
review_2_quote: They masked everything, treated the house like their own. Wouldn't use anyone else.
review_3_quote: Quoted fair, finished a day early, and the final coat is flawless.
about_paragraph: Paint Genius is a craft-first painting company. Most painters race the brush — we slow it down. Proper prep, the right primer, two coats, and clean lines that actually stay clean. Every job carries our written warranty.
